eas_text: A civil authority has issued A HAZARDOUS MATERIALS WARNING for the following counties or areas: Siskiyou, CA; at 12:46 PM ON MAR 17, 2026 Effective until 08:46 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: North Bound Traffic Reroute due to road closure on Hwy 97 in Dorris. Alternate Route: From Northbound Hwy97, Turn East on Shady Dell Rd, North on E. Butte Vly Rd, North on Dorris/Brown Rd, North on Center St to Hwy 97.
